bugsFound.description: Pre-existing violation: _FormSectionHeader and _SoatFormFields private widget classes in same file (one-widget-per-file rule). Not introduced by this change.

AC-2: Badge shows correct status (Vigente/Por vencer/Vencido)
AC-3: Create vehicle without SOAT → pop directly, no SOAT page
AC-4: Create vehicle + SOAT → airplane mode on confirmation → vehicle preserved + error SnackBar
AC-5: Open registration for event with allowedBrands=['*'] → vehicles shown
Regression: brand-restricted event → validation error on wrong brand
